title: Zs 3D Workstations
description: Redesigned villager workstation textures (blast furnace, smoker, grindstone, lectern, cartography table, fletching table, smithing table) to improve village aesthetics while keeping Minecraft mechanics unchanged.
body:
ZS 3D Workstations is a focused resource pack for Minecraft that redesigns villager workstation blocks. The pack only changes the visual appearance of selected workstations, keeping all vanilla gameplay mechanics and villager trades completely intact.

![Smithing Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/780b2c24862dcf31e6e679b6e4abd4b7a38ae16b.png)

Workstations Redesigned

🔥 Blast Furnace

🍖 Smoker

🛠 Grindstone

📚 Lectern

🗺 Cartography Table

🏹 Fletching Table

⚒ Smithing Table

Features

🎨 Custom, detailed workstation textures

⚡ Vanilla-friendly visual enhancement

🏘 Perfect for village and trading areas

🎮 Fully compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer
